description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a modern architectural style, featuring a combination of flat and gable roofs. The front facade includes a covered entryway supported by columns, a driveway leading to an attached garage, and a landscaped garden with shrubs and flowers. The house is surrounded by a wooden fence and has a spacious backyard with a patio area, outdoor seating, and a cluster of trees providing shade and privacy. Large windows are arranged asymmetrically across the exterior, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The exterior walls are finished in white with contrasting dark roofing and wooden accents. The property is set along a paved street, with a sidewalk and driveway access.
description: A modern two-story house with a mix of flat and gable roofs, large asymmetrical windows, a covered entryway, attached garage, and landscaped yard with trees and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with columns, driveway, garage, and landscaped garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, wooden fence, and open backyard patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio, and dense cluster of trees providing privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the patio, side entrance, and additional landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with columns, steps, and a prominent front door
